name: MSI B450M-A PRO MAX Micro ATX Motherboard - Socket AM4 - AMD B450 Chipset - Supports DDR4-4133(OC) - 1x PCIe 3.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 2.0 x1 - 1x M.2 Socket3 - HDMI 2.0b - DVI-D - USB 3.2 Gen1 Type-A - Gigabit LAN (B450MAPMAX)
